## Sophia Meadows

Source: https://singaporenewproperty.github.io/sophiameadows/

Submit We've Received Your Enquiry For Sophia Meadows Thank you for contacting Sophia Meadows. If you’ve selected ‘Chat With Whatsapp’, you’ll be receiving a Whatsapp notification soon from Sophia Meadows Developer Sales Team. You can also call us our hotline below for any enquiries. SHOWFLAT HOTLINE: +65 86375442 Disclaimer Disclaimer: Provisional Property Information&lt;br&gt;Please be aware that the property names used on this website are based on the road names of the Government Land Sales(GLS) sites or En bloc sales, and not the actual names of the developments. These provisional names are intended for reference purposes only and may differ from the final official names of the developments.Additionally, all calculations and figures provided on this site, including those related to prices and costs, are for illustrative purposes. They do not represent the actual or final selling prices of the developments. We are committed to ensuring that all information provided does not contain any offer, statement, representation, claim, or information that is inaccurate, false, or misleading. We strive for accuracy and transparency in all our communications.We urge all users of this website to exercise due diligence and verify the latest and most accurate information through direct inquiries.Our agents and the website are free from liability for any decisions or actions taken by consumers based on the information provided here.It is recommended to consult with our professional agents / banker and lawyer for detailed and personalised advice. Appointed Marketing Agency: Huttons Asia Pte. Ltd - Licence No: L3008899K - www.huttonsgroup.com Privacy Policy | Terms & Conditions WhatsApp Call Register CHAT SHOWFLAT NUMBER Register Privacy Policy Welcome to Sophia Meadows. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and engage our services. Company Details Authorized Agency: Huttons Asia Pte Ltd is the appointed agency authorised to advertise and transact sales on behalf of the developer. The appointed agent responsible for these activities is: Agent Name: Aston Foo Shi Wei Contact: +65 86375442 CEA Number: R062349D Agency Name: Huttons Asia Pte Ltd Information We Collect We may collect and process the following data about you: Personal Identification Information: Name, email address, phone number, etc. Demographic Information: Age, gender, location, etc. Technical Data: IP address, browser type and version, time zone setting, browser plug-in types and versions, operating system, and platform. Usage Data: Information about how you use our website, products, and services. How We Use Your Information We use the information we collect in the following ways: To Provide and Improve Services: To deliver the services you request and ensure optimal functionality of our website. To Communicate with You: To respond to your inquiries, provide customer support, and send updates and notifications. To Personalize Your Experience: To tailor our services to better suit your interests and needs. To Market Our Services: To send you promotional materials and advertisements related to our services, subject to your consent. To Comply with Legal Obligations: To comply with legal requirements and regulations. Disclosure of Your Information We may share your information with third parties in the following situations: With Service Providers: We may share your data with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as marketing and advertising partners. For Legal Reasons: We may disclose your information if required by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. With Your Consent: We may share your information with third parties if you have given us your consent t
